# 4st.li

Personal website of astro - crypto, programming, Linux, hacking, and personal projects.

## Pages

- [Home](https://4st.li/) - Personal site with blog posts and projects
- [Projects](https://4st.li/projects/) - Open source projects including Amy OS, Adventure Mods, Anomalous, Crosstune, YTMusicFS
- [Configs](https://4st.li/configs/) - Hardware and software configuration details
- [Contact](https://4st.li/contact/) - Contact information and donation links

## Blog

- [Recovering a TRON wallet with an Android exploit and brute force](https://4st.li/blog/tronlink-wallet-recovery/) - Technical walkthrough of recovering cryptocurrency from a locked wallet using CVE-2024-31317
- [Don't invest in yourself](https://4st.li/blog/invertir-en-vos/) - Critical essay on the "invest in yourself" advice given to young people
- [Run, Think, Shoot, Live](https://4st.li/blog/half-life/) - Personal essay about discovering Half-Life as a child

## Resources

- API Catalog: https://4st.li/.well-known/api-catalog
- Agent Skills: https://4st.li/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
